title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Vision and Design
text: Our campus An innovative learning environment with versatile teaching spaces, including lecture theatres, seminar rooms, and collaborative workspaces, all designed to support diverse learning styles and encourage interdisciplinary exchange. A strong sense of place Design of our campus embraces University of Southampton's Triple Helix approach, incorporating education, research and knowledge exachange. This will enable collaboration between academia, industry, and government. This integration of research, innovation, and enterprise will create new opportunities for students and academics to engage with real-world challenges and drive forward advancements in their fields.Beyond its functional role, the campus is designed to foster a strong sense of place. Our designs honour the University of Southampton’s heritage while celebrating India’s rich cultural identity, blending local influences with a global outlook. Interiors meet international standards of comfort and refinement, combining natural materials and forms inspired by Southampton’s green landscapes with patterns and motifs drawn from Indian architectural and craft traditions. Built for teaching and learning Adaptability and efficiency are vital to the design of campus, with multi-purpose areas transitioning seamlessly between formal teaching, independent learning and research and workplace activities. This maximises resource use while promoting engagement between students and faculties.The campus is currently being outfitted for the first cohort of students in August 2025.
summary: The University of Southampton Delhi campus features an innovative learning environment, embracing the Triple Helix approach for collaboration between academia, industry, and government, while blending local and global cultural influences.

title: University of Southampton Delhi Campus Facilities and Sustainability
text: Our campus is located at International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page. Study at your own speed Choose from study pods and tables located throughout campus, collaborate on larger group work in informal spaces, book a private meeting room or visit the centrally located quiet study and reading room. A range of teaching spaces Lessons are delivered in multi-functional spaces, featuring modular layouts adaptable to different teaching styles, and more traditional tiered lecture theatres. Information rich Our library is a rich vein of information to mine for students, staff and entrpreneurs. Readers have access to on-campus physical and digital resources as well as inter-library digital loans. Technology enabled learning Our modern campus features high speed wi-fi and charging points adjacent to learning and study locations. Video screens are used for teaching and we typically record lectures for on-demand playback. Truly accessible Our multi-floor campus is for all, with lifts to upper floors, ramped exterior access and interior passageways and room spaces designed for accessibility. A sustainable future The International Tech Park has USGBC LEED Platinum certification, offering rich landscape and Green Environment in urban settings. Our campus offers air conditioning and Higher MERV & UVGI for effectiveness of air filters.
summary: The Gurugram campus provides versatile teaching spaces, a comprehensive library, high-speed Wi-Fi, full accessibility, and achieved LEED Platinum certification for its sustainable and modern learning environment.

title: Specialized Financial, Computing, and Electronics Laboratories
text: Financial laboratory Home to our Bloomberg Terminals, a gateway to global financial data, news and analytics. Students gain experience of the identical technology and software used by major financial institutions, professional traders, government agencies and 325,000 of the world's most influential decision-makers. We expect that the 'FinTech Lab' could be used for private study, small tutorials, society events and trading competitions. Computing laboratory Our computing laboratory is a dedicated computer science facility for both individual and project work. It's a lively, communal space, where students will find support from both a programming help desk for programming-related questions, and IT help desk for other queries. The lab will be also be used for activities parallel to study, such as the Global Game Jam, as well as career events and workshops Electronics laboratory Our electronics lab is integral to course modules that require 'test and measure' activities. Bespoke lab benches hold standard test equipment such as a PSU, an oscilloscope/logic analyser, a digital bench multimeter, an arbitrary waveform generator, all linked to a control PC and screen.
summary: The campus offers specialized laboratories, including a Financial lab with Bloomberg Terminals, a Computing lab for computer science projects, and an Electronics lab for 'test and measure' course activities.

title: International Tech Park Gurgaon Amenities and Transport
text: Premium shared facilities As part of an established technology park, our campus benefits from additional high-quality facilities. This is a great chance to get to know the neighbours and network with local business and entrpreneurs. Some facilities may need to be booked and may incur an additional access charge. Informal places to network Socialise and relax as you eat Collaborate and work together Where learning meets tech and business Our campus is at the heart of a 60 acre International Technology Park, home to 8 million square feet of premium business space. The 'new growth corridor', just off Golf Course Extension Road near Sector 59, is a bustling location supported by multiple amenities and well-planned infrastructure. University shuttle bus Students at the official student hostel can use the university's private shuttle bus to travel free of charge between their accommodation and campus. Private shuttle bus The dedicated International Tech Park shuttle connects staff, students and visitors to the local Rapid Metro Station at Sector 55/56 Gurgaon. Travelling by taxi Our campus is conveniently located off major routes and intersections in Sector 59 just to the south of Delhi, and is a 45 minute drive away from Indira Gandhi international airport. The wider region around campus hosts restaurants, hotels, a golf course, equestrian centre and the amenties you would expect from a bustling Technology Park.
summary: Located within International Tech Park Gurgaon, the campus benefits from shared facilities, networking opportunities, shuttle bus services to accommodation and metro, and easy access to Delhi and Indira Gandhi Airport.

title: FAQs: Campus Travel, Tours, and Team Meetings
text: You might also want to know How can I travel between the student hostel and campus? Perhaps the best way to get to campus in the morning from our student hostel, or back there again at night, is the private shuttle bus. This free service will run at regular intervals every weekday. Can I visit the campus in person or book a tour? Our campus is located at International Tech Park Gurgaon, Near Sec 59, Off, Golf Course Ext Rd, Gurugram, Haryana 122101. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page. How can I meet your team? You can meet us online, and in a selection of major cities in India. You can see when and where, by visiting the Events area of our website. When event tickets are available, you will be able to book a physical event, or to register for an on online session, from the event page. The best way to see campus is to book a pre-planned tour from our events page.
summary: This section provides FAQs on traveling between the student hostel and campus via shuttle bus, booking pre-planned campus tours, and meeting the University team online or in major Indian cities.
